title: More Candles
description: redstone candle, soul candle, and end candle
body:
# More Candles

Adds candle blocks that follow vanilla design language but provide clear functional uses. The overall direction stays Vanilla+ focused — drop-in usability, natural integration with the base game, and room for future themed candle variants to be added without changing existing systems.

# Main Features

## Redstone Candle

Looks like a candle, but behaves closer to a redstone torch and can be used directly in circuits.

*   Emits redstone power by default
*   Can be used as a compact inverting component
*   Signal strength scales with candle count in the same block (1–4 candles: 3 / 7 / 11 / 15)
*   Provides soft lighting and redstone-style particle effects for visual feedback

## Soul Candle

An atmospheric light source themed around soul fire, designed primarily for building and environmental use.

*   Cool-toned lighting with soul flame visuals
*   Fits Nether bases, ruins, underground areas, and darker builds
*   Placement and interaction follow vanilla candle behavior

### Piglin Interaction 
- (MobCivics 0.4.0 or newer)

When **MobCivics 0.4.0** is installed, lit Soul Candles are recognized by Piglins as a repellent light source.

*   Only active while the candle is lit, similar to a soul campfire
*   Works as a normal light source if MobCivics is not installed
*   No hard dependency — safe to include without causing crashes or load errors

## For Modpack Creators

Free to include in modpacks and integrations. Please retain proper credit and avoid redistributing downloads through unofficial mirrors.
